rationale: 8 years of full-stack/backend engineering with only self-learner AI exposure (side-project RAG), no production IR or ranking experience, and two roles at fictional companies (Initech, Dunder Mifflin) that undermine credibility.

Built semantic search with sentence-transformers + FAISS at Rephrase.ai, owned learning-to-rank evolution at Uber, holds BM25 expert and Qdrant advanced skills with 55+ months, and has an IIT Kanpur PhD — directly aligned with every core requirement.

Entire 11-year career is non-technical (marketing, operations, HR, content writing) at IT-services firms (Infosys, TCS) with RAG listed as only 8 months advanced — a classic anti-persona with zero production engineering or ML depth.

Strong data-engineering background at product companies (Swiggy, Meesho, upGrad) with lightweight ML (XGBoost/sklearn), but no production embedding-based retrieval, ranking systems, or evaluation metric ownership (NDCG/MRR/MAP).

Owned a learning-to-rank layer at Freshworks and built a 10M-user recommendation system with sentence-transformer embeddings at Yellow.ai, with expert-level Sentence Transformers and Qdrant skills backed by Stanford + IIT Kharagpur credentials.

Backend/cloud engineer with only self-learner AI exposure; current role at Infosys (IT services) and prior roles at Pied Piper and Dunder Mifflin (fictional companies), with no production ML, embeddings, or IR ranking experience.

Only 2.8 years of experience in full-stack web development with no AI/ML production work; one role at fictional Stark Industries and another at Cognizant (IT services), with skills entirely in web frameworks and no ranking or retrieval exposure.

8.7-year career consists entirely of marketing, brand design, and business analyst roles at fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin, Wayne Enterprises) and IT-services (TCS), with no engineering or ML depth whatsoever.

Spent 51 months as a .NET Developer at Mphasis (IT services) doing Android development, with only a self-learner AI summary and Vector Search listed at intermediate level for 28 months — no production IR, ranking, or embedding system evidence.

10.7-year career is entirely project management, HR, and brand/business analyst roles at Dunder Mifflin (fictional), Infosys (IT services), and similar non-technical firms with zero engineering or ML credentials.
